steps.title: Substitute t=4
steps.content: The equation $s=40+2t$ gives speed at time $t$. Substitute $t=4$: $$s=40+2(4).$$

steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content: So $s=48$ mph. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice D, $48$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
